name: Hippo Pot De Mousse
recipeIngredient: 500 ml heavy cream, well chilled. Whip
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate together in the top of a double boiler. Stir slowly to avoid burning the chocolate and keep all moisture away from the pot. Allow the chocolate to cool for five minutes.
2. While the chocolate is cooling, whip the cream and almond extract until very stiff.
3. Gently fold the cooled chocolate into the whipped cream. There will be many small pieces of chocolate in the mixture.
4. If you plan to serve the mousse later, spoon it into six large wine glasses. Chill for one hour before serving.
Author's Notes:
This recipe is an adaptation of a simple chocolate mousse from Sandra Boynton's book. It simplifies the preparation process compared to many French mousse recipes while still delivering great results. Be careful when melting the chocolate in a microwave, as semisweet chocolate can caramelize quickly if overheated, resulting in a mess and ruined chocolate.
